CREATE TABLE test_conditions (a INT, b INT, c INT);
SELECT if(a > 0, b, c) AS result FROM test_conditions;
SELECT if(a = 1, b + 1, c - 1) AS adjusted_result FROM test_conditions;
SELECT if(a < 0, b * 2, if(c > b, c - b, b + c)) AS complex_result FROM test_conditions;
CREATE TABLE other_table (x INT, y INT);
SELECT if(t.a > t.b, t.c, ot.y) AS final_result FROM test_conditions t JOIN other_table ot ON t.a = ot.x;
SELECT if((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_conditions) > 0, (SELECT AVG(b) FROM test_conditions), 0) AS average_b;
SELECT if EXISTS (SELECT * FROM test_conditions WHERE a > 0) THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_conditions) ELSE 0 AS count_positive;
SELECT if((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_test WHERE val > 1) > 1, (SELECT SUM(val) FROM nested_test), (SELECT MIN(val) FROM nested_test)) AS nested_if_result;
